data.body:
PASS 1 (G1G2 edit-set/scope) — grounded findings:

AFFIRM: harness.py:281 typo target verified exact (`# noqa: BLE0001` extra-0, `except BaseException`). grounding/* and _engine_support/* allowlist entries confirmed present (pyproject.toml:213-215). grounding/ has no `print(` (stderr-migration scope is _engine_support-only).

FINDING 1 — unenumerated allowlist entry: `src/rebar/grounding/detectors/*` is a SEPARATE per-file-ignore (pyproject.toml:214) carrying its own BLE001 ignore, covering a bare `except Exception:` at detectors/registry.py:213. AC4 "these packages removed from the allowlist" implies removing it too, but the plan names only `grounding/*`. Enumerate `grounding/detectors/*` + registry.py:213 explicitly.

FINDING 2 — T201 removal vs stdout data-contract: `_engine_support/*` allowlist is `["BLE001","T201"]`. pyproject.toml:211-212 + 195-197 state _engine_support T201 is the LEGITIMATE machine-contract stdout (reads_cli/validate/next_batch `print(json.dumps(...))`), NOT transitional. Plan migrates only "stderr-diagnostic prints" yet AC4 demands full allowlist (incl. T201) removal — conflict: dropping T201 will flag the surviving stdout-contract prints. Clarify whether _engine_support keeps a scoped/inline T201 (like _commands/_io) or the contract prints get inline `# noqa: T201`.
